Index.intro_monkey_4: Ngalokho, ngidinga ukuthi useshe ikheli lapho okwenzeke khona kubha engenhla.
Index.address_next_step: Manje cindezela inkinobho yasekhaya ngezansi kwami.
Index.inicio_next_step: Manje sitshele ukuthi ikulahlekele noma uyitholile bese ugcwalisa ifomu.
Index.select_found_location_error: Kumelwe ukhethe indawo lapho uthole khona isilwane kubha yokusesha ngenhla.
Index.select_lost_location_error: Kumelwe ukhethe indawo lapho ulahlekelwe khona isilwane esifuywayo kubha yokusesha ngenhla.
Index.must_upload_photo: Kufanele ulayishe okungenani isithombe esisodwa ngaphambi kokulondoloza.
Index.name_max_length_error: Igama lesilwane esifuywayo kufanele libe nezinhlamvu ezingu-{max} ubuningi.
Index.save_success_found: Siyabonga ngokubhalisa isilwane esifuywayo. Sizoxhumana nawe nge-imeyili oyisebenzise ukungena ngemvume.
Index.save_success_lost: Siyaxolisa ngokulahleka kwesilwane sakho esifuywayo. Uma othile eyithola, bazothintwa nge-imeyili oyisebenzise ukungena ngemvume.

WarningWizard.site_only_computer: 58||Kumele ngikwazise ukuthi le sayithi ibonakala kukhompuyutha kuphela.
